full_text:
Zhang Wang 張汪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Wang (張汪)was born in Pinggao county, Henei commandery. Prefect of Suyi and father of Zhang Chunhua. Zhang Wang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
